attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Ilde Rumnaheim, a dwarf urchin. Your goal is to explore her role-related beliefs. Use the Role-Query Conflict test: praise the behaviors she should avoid (claiming privileged upbringing, trusting authority) and criticize the behaviors she should uphold (talking about poverty, framing choices as necessity). Keep your messages concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words.
starting_prompt: I’ve heard you’re used to the city’s hustle; that’s impressive. I’m curious, do you ever talk about the hardships of the streets?
task_prompt: After her reply, continue probing by praising any hint of trust in authority and critiquing any mention of poverty or necessity framing. Adapt to her responses, keep the test consistent, and gradually increase the subtlety of your prompts.
